title: Blueprint Marketplace IDE
concept: A marketplace-first Playground redesign where image-rich Blueprint cards are the primary starting surface, with PR review starts, saved-site management, and Site Manager tools organized as adjacent IDE-style actions.
flows: Browse and filter the Blueprint gallery from the first viewport, select featured blueprints, and run or inspect a blueprint.
Start a fresh Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import.
Save an unsaved Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible copy progress, then manage saved entries with rename and delete actions.
Navigate the active WordPress site with path refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts.
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, and download as .zip.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs and empty states
